title: Planeta Cobblemon Pokémon Pack
description: A free-to-use datapack that adds model to some Pokémon from our server Planeta Cobblemon. Join Now! :D
body:
## Quer jogar Cobblemon? Entre no nosso [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/planetacobblemon) e baixe nosso [modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/planeta-cobblemon)!!!

![roaringmoon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25336fc2e24f314fa659a91520e4752fc50276dc.jpeg)
### Join our server [**Planeta Coblemon**](https://discord.gg/invite/planetacobblemon) now!

**This is a free-to-use datapack available for everyone. Players can freely use it. Servers are required to credit appropriately.**

_Please contact us on our [**Discord**](https://discord.gg/invite/planetacobblemon) by creating a support ticket in the #criar-ticket channel before making skins for the models or commercializing them with crates, etc., within the server._

The sole purpose of this mod is to enhance and add Pokémon textures/models. Currently, none of the Pokémon spawn automatically.

List of Pokémon added:
- Roaring Moon **NEW**
- Ting-Lu
- Wo-Chien
- Terrakion
- Virizion
- Iron Crown
- Iron Boulder
- Iron Jugulis
- Iron Hands
- Iron Treads
- Celesteela
- Dedenne
- Trubbish
- Electrike
- Heatran

Many Pokémon don’t have animations yet. **We plan to add more animations and Pokémon in the future.** ;)
